arts.sum: The long-standing pleas of the Barcelona faithful regarding young winger Lamine Yamal have on Saturday at long last been answered. This comes by way of Barcelona’s starting line-up to take…

arts.ttl: Which Bayern attacker could Barcelona sign during next summer's transfer window?
arts.sum: Bayern Munich attacker Kingsley Coman emerges as a transfer target for Barcelona, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Barcelona in a 'Cold War' with 'world's best'
arts.sum: The Uruguay international has not featured for the club under new coach Hansi Flick after suffering a long-term injury on international duty in the summer. With the exception of losing the opening game in the Champions League, Flick's men have been flawless so far this season, which has shown the club that big-earner Araujo is expendable.

arts.ttl: Barcelona tipped to sell key midfielder next summer
arts.sum: The powers that be at La Liga giants Barcelona are ready to part with a headline member of the club’s midfield ranks next summer. That’s according to Diario Sport, who…

arts.ttl: Osasuna vs Barcelona LIVE: Possible lineups and latest news
arts.sum: Barcelona will look to extend their perfect start to the LaLiga season as the Catalan giants have won all seven of their matches so far, sitting at the top of the table with 21 points. Osasuna, under new coach Vicente Moreno, have had a solid start and sit in seventh place with 11 points from seven games.

arts.ttl: Why Barcelona’s move for Wojciech Szczęsny has been delayed
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona’s move for free agent goalkeeper Wojciech Szczęsny has been put momentarily on hold. That’s according to Relevo, who have on Saturday provided the latest on the…

arts.ttl: Barcelona possible starting XI in LaLiga against Osasuna
arts.sum: In midfield, Eric Garcia and Casadó will play as central midfielders and in the attacking positions Lamine Yamal, Pedri - who was rested against Getafe - Raphinha and Lewandowski seem to be untouchable . Hansi Flick’s FC Barcelona, the undefeated leader of La Liga, will aim for another victory today at El Sadar against Osasuna (3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 p.m. PT).

arts.ttl: Joan Laporta provides update on Barcelona’s return to the Camp Nou

arts.ttl: Barcelona chief provides update on search for new goalkeeper
arts.sum: Barcelona president Joan Laporta has on Saturday provided an update on the club’s rumoured pursuit of a new goalkeeper. The subject of reinforcements between the posts has of course dominated…

arts.ttl: Barcelona open to selling midfielder Pep Guardiola has on Rodri replacement shortlist
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to enter the January transfer market in search of a replacement for Rodri. The Spanish midfielder has been ruled out for most of the season after injuring his ACL against Arsenal at the Etihad Stadium last weekend.
